name: Abra
ability_description: When Abra loses in battle, the player to your left may add it to his team. Abra does not need to be put in a Pokéball.

name: Aerodactyl
ability_description: Receive a Pokémon from the area you are in (no Legendaries or Aerodactyl). One charge.

name: Alakazam
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may teleport to the location of another player. One charge.

name: Ampharos
ability_description: When using Ampharos in battle, you can rethrow the battle dice once per battle.

name: Arbok
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may always move forward to an opponent on another tile within 5 tiles.

name: Arcanine
ability_description: When landed on a tile, you can choose to also execute the next tile. Two charges.

name: Articuno
ability_description: When landed on an event tile, you may take two cards at once and choose which cards to execute (discard the rest). Cards affecting other players still do so.

name: Beedrill
ability_description: Beedrill has 1 extra Battle Point and is worth 10 extra Master Points for each other Beedrill in your team.

name: Bellsprout
ability_description: You may treat the tile you landed on as a grass tile. One charge. Can't be used at a roadblock.

name: Blastoise
ability_description: You may rethrow the move dice once per turn.

name: Blissey
ability_description: Once per turn (not during a fight), you may heal one of your other Pokémon.

name: Bulbasaur
ability_description: Whenever your move dice outcome is 4 or 6, you may divide the outcome by 2.

name: Butterfree
ability_description: Ao capturar, não gasta Pokébola (1x por turno)

name: Caterpie
ability_description: Imune a efeitos negativos de eventos

name: Celebi
ability_description: Increases the Battle Points of all Pokémon in your team by 2. Celebi cannot battle.

name: Chansey
ability_description: Once per turn (not during a fight), you may heal one of your other Pokémon.

name: Charizard
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 1 / 3 you may move one tile further, and when the outcome is 4 / 6 you may move one tile less.

name: Charmander
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 1 / 3 you may move one tile further, and when the outcome is 4 / 6 you may move one tile less.

name: Charmeleon
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 1 / 3 you may move one tile further, and when the outcome is 4 / 6 you may move one tile less.

name: Clefable
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 6, you may change the outcome to 1.

name: Clefairy
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 6, you may change the outcome to 1.

name: Cleffa
ability_description: Whenever the outcome of the move dice is 6, you may change the outcome to 1.

name: Cloyster
ability_description: In a battle, Cloyster has to lose twice before he is knocked out.

name: Crobat
ability_description: You may double the move dice outcome. Cannot be used when moving backwards. Four charges.

name: Cubone
ability_description: You can stay put on a tile for an additional turn. One charge. You can only stay put once per area.

name: Delibird
ability_description: Throw the dice for a present! 1,2 = heal all your Pkmn; 3 = Miracle Stone; 4 = Defender; 5 = Lucky Powder; 6 = Pokeball for every player! Three charges.

name: Dewgong
ability_description: You may also take a Victory Card after losing a duel.

name: Diglett
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, dig back to a tile no more than five tiles away. One charge. You can only move back with Dig once per area.

name: Ditto
ability_description: Transform into any in-game Pokémon (no Legend or Starter), permanently copying its Battle Points and ability. Can only transform once per game.

name: Dodrio
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may move 4 tiles. Three charges.

name: Doduo
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may move 4 tiles. One charge.

name: Dragonair
ability_description: When evolving one of your Pokémon, you can evolve it directly to the highest stage possible. One charge.

name: Dragonite
ability_description: You may draw a card from the Victory Pile. Two charges.

name: Dratini
ability_description: If the outcome of your move dice is ever 6, Dratini evolves.

name: Drowzee
ability_description: You may move the same amount of tiles as the previous player. One charge.

name: Dugtrio
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, dig back to a tile no more than five tiles away. One charge. You can only move back with Dig once per area.

name: Dunsparce
ability_description: Cause one of your Pokémon to evolve. One charge.

name: Eevee
ability_description: When evolving Eevee, throw the dice: 1 = Espeon 2 = Umbreon 3 = Flareon 4 = Vaporeon 5 = Jolteon 6 = Choose!

name: Ekans
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may move forward to a player on another tile within 5 tiles. One charge.

name: Electabuzz

ability_description: Electrode doesn't need to be put in a Pokéball. Ditto cannot copy this ability.

name: Entei

name: Espeon
ability_description: You may always look at the top card of the event pile.

name: Exeggcute
ability_description: You receive a Nugget if you release Exeggcute.

name: Exeggutor
ability_description: You may draw a card from the Event Pile. Four charges.

name: Farfetch'D

ability_description: When using Flaaffy in battle, you can rethrow the battle dice once per battle.

name: Flareon
ability_description: You may rethrow the battle dice. Four charges.

name: Gastly
ability_description: Whenever Gastly is knocked out, you may choose to knock out one of your other Pokémon instead.

name: Gengar
ability_description: Whenever Gengar is knocked out, you may choose to knock out one of your other Pokémon instead.

ability_description: Your Pokémon have 1 additional Battle Point if you are the player with the most knocked out Pokémon. This effect does not work at the Pokémon League.

name: Girafarig

name: Golbat
ability_description: Instead of throwing the move dice, you may move forward to a tile no further than five ahead. One charge.

name: Golduck

name: Golem

name: Granbull
ability_description: You may rethrow the capture or move dice once per turn. Four charges.

name: Graveler
ability_description: Your Pokémon have 1 additional Battle Point if you are the player with the most knocked out Pokémon. This effect does not work at the Pokémon League.

name: Grimer

name: Growlithe
ability_description: When landed on a tile, you can choose to also execute the next tile. One charge.

name: Gyarados

name: Haunter
ability_description: Whenever Haunter is knocked out, you may choose to knock out one of your other Pokémon instead.

name: Hitmonchan
ability_description: When using Hitmonchan in battle, you may always throw two dice at once (the highest outcome counts).

name: Hitmonlee

name: Hitmontop

name: Houndoom

ability_description: Whenever your move dice outcome is 4 or 6, you may divide the outcome by 2.

ability_description: You may rethrow any dice throw. One charge.

name: Mareep
